root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( select (CASE lag(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) WHEN sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,
sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,
sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date ) as resignation_approve_date_tdate , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code <> '0' or sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code <> '09' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no )tab
